title: Update climacommon to 2024_05_27

body: The space of definition of the NetCDFWriter is primarily used to look at the vertical direction. As such, we need to pass a space with the vertical direction. From there, we can take slices (but the oppsite is no true).
title: Add more documentation on NetCDFWriter space
